test_results.actual:
#
# trace03.txt - Run a foreground job.
#
tsh> quit

#
# trace04.txt - Run a background job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 1 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 1 &

#
# trace05.txt - Process jobs builtin command.
#
tsh> ./myspin 2 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 2 &
tsh> .

#
# trace06.txt - Forward SIGINT to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4
Job [1] (PID) terminated by si

#
# trace07.txt - Forward SIGINT only to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4

#
# trace08.txt - Forward SIGTSTP only to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin

#
# trace09.txt - Process bg builtin command
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4 &
tsh> ./my

#
# trace10.txt - Process fg builtin command. 
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4 &
tsh> fg

#
# trace11.txt - Forward SIGINT to every process in foreground process group
#
tsh> ./mysplit 4
Job

#
# trace12.txt - Forward SIGTSTP to every process in foreground process group
#
tsh> ./mysplit 4
Jo

#
# trace13.txt - Restart every stopped process in process group
#
-e tsh> ./mysplit 4
Job [1] (PID)

#
# trace14.txt - Simple error handling
#
tsh> ./bogus
./bogus: Command not found
-e tsh> ./myspin 4

#
# trace15.txt - Putting it all together
#
tsh> ./bogus
./bogus: Command not found
tsh> ./myspin 10

#
# trace16.txt - Tests whether the shell can handle SIGTSTP and SIGINT
# signals that come from oth

#
# trace17.txt - Process fg builtin command (one stopped job)
#
tsh> ./mystop 4
Job [1] (PID) stopp

#
# trace18.txt - Process fg builtin command (two jobs)
#
tsh> ./myspin 10 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 1

#
# trace19.txt - Comprehensive job control test
#
tsh> ./myspin 10 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 10 &
tsh

#
# trace20.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path is NULL. Requ

#
# trace21.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path begins with a

#
# trace22.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path contains a ':

#
# trace23.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path ends with a '

#
# trace24.txt - Tests PATH search with normal path containing current dir
#
tsh> myspin 1
tsh> qui

test_results.actual:
#
# trace03.txt - Run a foreground job.
#
tsh> quit

#
# trace04.txt - Run a background job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 1 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 1 &

#
# trace05.txt - Process jobs builtin command.
#
tsh> ./myspin 2 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 2 &
tsh> .

#
# trace06.txt - Forward SIGINT to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4
Job [1] (PID) terminated by si

#
# trace07.txt - Forward SIGINT only to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4

#
# trace08.txt - Forward SIGTSTP only to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin

#
# trace09.txt - Process bg builtin command
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4 &
tsh> ./my

#
# trace10.txt - Process fg builtin command. 
#
tsh> ./myspin 4 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 4 &
tsh> fg

#
# trace11.txt - Forward SIGINT to every process in foreground process group
#
tsh> ./mysplit 4
Job

#
# trace12.txt - Forward SIGTSTP to every process in foreground process group
#
tsh> ./mysplit 4
Jo

#
# trace13.txt - Restart every stopped process in process group
#
-e tsh> ./mysplit 4
Job [1] (PID)

#
# trace14.txt - Simple error handling
#
tsh> ./bogus
./bogus: Command not found
-e tsh> ./myspin 4

#
# trace15.txt - Putting it all together
#
tsh> ./bogus
./bogus: Command not found
tsh> ./myspin 10

#
# trace16.txt - Tests whether the shell can handle SIGTSTP and SIGINT
# signals that come from oth

#
# trace17.txt - Process fg builtin command (one stopped job)
#
tsh> ./mystop 4
Job [1] (PID) stopp

#
# trace18.txt - Process fg builtin command (two jobs)
#
tsh> ./myspin 10 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 1

#
# trace19.txt - Comprehensive job control test
#
tsh> ./myspin 10 \046
[1] (PID) ./myspin 10 &
tsh

#
# trace20.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path is NULL. Requ

#
# trace21.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path begins with a

#
# trace22.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path contains a ':

#
# trace23.txt - Tests whether the shell searches the current directory
# if the path ends with a '

#
# trace24.txt - Tests PATH search with normal path containing current dir
#
tsh> myspin 1
tsh> qui

#
# trace03.txt - Run a foreground job.
#
tsh> quit
[1] (PID) /bin/echo tsh> quit

#
# trace04.txt - Run a background job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 1 \046
[1] (PID) /bin/echo tsh> ./myspin 1 \

#
# trace05.txt - Process jobs builtin command.
#
tsh> ./myspin 2 \046
[1] (PID) /bin/echo tsh> ./my

#
# trace06.txt - Forward SIGINT to foreground job.
#
tsh> ./myspin 4
[1] (PID) /bin/echo tsh> ./mys

#
# trace07.txt - Forward SIGINT only to foreground job.
#
